steps.title: Isolate $p$ on the left side
steps.content:
Starting from $p + 29 = q + r$, subtract $29$ from both sides to undo the $+29$:
$$p + 29 - 29 = q + r - 29$$
$$p = q + r - 29$$

steps.title: Check each choice
steps.content:
• A) $p = q + r + 29$: this would mean $p - 29 = q + r$, not $p + 29 = q + r$. Eliminate.
  • B) $p = q + r - 29$: adding $29$ to both sides gives $p + 29 = q + r$. Match.
  • C) $p = -q - r + 29$: implies $q + r = 29 - p$, not what's given. Eliminate.
  • D) $p = -q - r - 29$: implies $q + r = -p - 29$, not what's given. Eliminate.
That is the correct answer.
